With this wisdom, and some freshly-wedged clay waiting to be espresso cups, I will leave you twitter- my hands will be covered in liquified dirt for the foreseeable future, with the nice side effect that checking my phone is treacherous and best avoided
I also tried to see if I could get away without wedging my clay, which is a chore sometimes, and I had the worst time ever, always do your chores and wedge your clay

Also I spent the past month trying to figure out the clay drying times and how long it takes to get leather hard and then I saw some galaxy brain in the studio using a heat gun, these people are on another level

Some yet-unknown forces inside me are battling it out, I keep trying to make espresso cups and some part of me keeps turning them into plates, loves plates on a lizard level, must resist this dark force
